next_action: DO NOT blind-resume /julian-orchestrator:milestone — v2.8 SHIPPED 2026-07-01 by owner directive (plugin 2.8.0, merge f19be14 on main, tag v2.8, published) WITHOUT 33-02 and WITHOUT Phase 34's smoke proofs. The 33-02 plan remains codex-APPROVED but MUST BE REBASED before execution: the post-plan Fable remediation (commits 2ead5a9..3bd1c4c) edited the same review.md regions 33-02 targets (Phase 0 gained the $GUARD_PY resolution block near the mode/scope sites the $SCOPE_ARGS normalizer rewrites; Phase 0.6's --min-confidence parse prose changed; min_confidence range is now 0-49). context_notes: Phase 33 (Codex legibility + safer fix-loop, LEGIBLE-01/02/03, prose+config only) passed DISCUSS + PLAN + a HARD adversarial gate (codex 4 passes / 3 rewrites, cap raised to 3 with owner authorization at the cap, final APPROVE). Both plans (33-01/33-02) plan-checker-PASSED and codex-APPROVED. Wave 1 (33-01) is DONE. Only Wave 2 (33-02, the orchestrator-prose wiring) + verify + deep-review + Phase 34 remain. GOTCHAS for the resumer: codex-adversarial Skill is disable-model-invocation -> call the companion directly (nohup + gtimeout detached, Monitor on log-GROWTH not broker updatedAt, cancel+relaunch on stall). Bash stat mtime goes stale mid-session -> use md5/content-grep to confirm a subagent write landed. .planning is gitignored -> force-add SUMMARY/plan/context files. Test runner is bare 'pytest -q' from plugins/vibe-check/scripts (NOT python3 -m pytest). run_verify_gate is BASH not zsh. NO plugin.json bump until Phase 34.
